india_trends.title: Reliance Jio IPO: How much-awaited IPO likely to impact Reliance share price?
india_trends.summary: Reliance Jio is reworking its much-awaited IPO into a fully fresh issue of shares, dropping the earlier plan where global investors would have partially sold their stakes.

india_trends.summary: Power Finance Corporation has taken a key step toward merging with REC Limited after its board approved seeking the President of India’s nod for the transaction. india_trends.title: Realty group Sattva deepens premium hotel push amid travel boom
india_trends.summary: Sattva’s expansion comes amid a broader shift among Indian real estate developers towards hospitality assets as room rates and occupancies remain high after the pandemic-led travel rebound.
